---
title: "Measuring MLB Catcher Defensive Contributions Through Pitch Framing"
author: "Your Name"
date: "Spring 2026"
format: 
  pdf:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Abstract

# Introduction

# Data

## Data Sources

## Preprocessing

## Exploratory Data Analysis

# Methods

## Your Name: Pitch Framing via Mixed-Effects Logistic Regression

# Results

## Your Name: Framing Model Results

# Discussion

## Conclusions

## Limitations

## Future Work

# References
